top3.sql:
WITH top_spender AS (
    SELECT 
        t.CustomerID,
        c.Currency,
        SUM(t.Amount * t.Price) AS total_spent
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    GROUP BY t.CustomerID, c.Currency
    ORDER BY total_spent DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    ts.CustomerID,
    AVG(t.Price) AS avg_price_per_item,
    ts.Currency
FROM top_spender ts
JOIN transactions_1k t ON ts.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
GROUP BY ts.CustomerID, ts.Currency;

SELECT c.CustomerID, SUM(t.Amount * t.Price) AS total_spent, AVG(t.Price) AS avg_price_per_item, c.Currency
FROM customers c
JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Currency
ORDER BY total_spent DESC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
WITH top_spender AS (
    SELECT 
        t.CustomerID,
        c.Currency,
        SUM(t.Amount * t.Price) AS total_spent
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    GROUP BY t.CustomerID, c.Currency
    ORDER BY total_spent DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    ts.CustomerID,
    AVG(t.Price) AS avg_price_per_item,
    ts.Currency
FROM top_spender ts
JOIN transactions_1k t ON ts.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
GROUP BY ts.CustomerID, ts.Currency;
